steps.title: Convert the percent increase
steps.content:
A number that is $25\%$ greater than $80$ equals the original plus another $25\%$.
$$
100\%+25\%=125\%=1.25
$$

steps.title: Multiply by the original number
steps.content: Use the increase multiplier on the original number. $$ 80(1.25)=100 $$ The answer is B.
